Secure transaction via ARMORA Network

Helpful Information

  • Exact amounts must be paid to ensure auto-verification.
  • Receipts are generated locally for your security.
  • Upload the generated PDF to our Discord ticket for instant delivery.
  • Crypto payments (USDT) are processed on the TRC20 network.
